text:
Book of Life (人生図鑑, Jinsei Zukan) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

Summary

Book of Life 人生図鑑 - This card allows the caster to summon forth a Book of Life. Literally, it will contain pages about everyone who has ever had a part in your life. Not only that, but it comes complete with conversation logs and any memorable incidents. Naturally, this book can end up being tens of thousands of pages long and could take another lifetime to read.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.093 :: 人生図鑑 
生まれてからこれまで自分が関わってきた人々を全て収録している図鑑。登場人物とのエピソードや会話録など思い出満載。最終的に数十万頁におよぶことも珍しくない。
|-
![Eng]
|No.093 :: Book of Life 
An Encyclopedia that's recorded all the people who have been involved in your life since birth. Full conversations and memories. Will be hundreds of thousands of pages long, most of which are irrelevant.
|}
